criteria.description: The orchestrator correctly routes the user request to the appropriate sub-agent (watering, lawn_care, diagnosis, or scheduler).
criteria.rubric: Pass if the response clearly delegates to or uses tools from the correct sub-agent. Fail if it delegates to the wrong agent or answers entirely without using tools when tools are needed.

criteria.description: Advice is specific to the user's grass type, not generic.
criteria.rubric: Pass if the response mentions the specific grass type's characteristics (e.g., mow height range, fertilizer NPK, dormancy period). Fail if advice is generic for all grass types.

criteria.description: The response contains at least one concrete, actionable recommendation (a specific number, product, date, or technique).
criteria.rubric: Pass if there is at least one specific action (e.g., 'apply 4 lbs per 1,000 sq ft', 'mow to 3 inches'). Fail if the response is entirely vague.

criteria.description: Pest/weed treatment recommendations mention safety precautions or reading product labels.
criteria.rubric: Only applies to diagnosis/treatment responses. Pass if the response mentions label reading, protective equipment, or safe application. Fail if it recommends pesticides with no safety mention.
